tasks.subject: Task 1: Add brew "fzf" to the Brewfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the one new brew this ring needs (`fzf`, the engine behind fzf-tab and `FZF_DEFAULT_OPTS`) in alphabetically-sorted position — byte-identical to upstream's line.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `brew "fzf"` sits between `brew "findutils"` and `brew "gawk"`.
- [ ] The added line is byte-identical to upstream's (`brew "fzf"`).
- [ ] No new fork-only Brewfile line: the only fork-only line vs upstream is still the pre-existing Ring-10 `vscode "davidanson.vscode-markdownlint"`.
- [ ] `brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all` parses without error.

**Verify:** `comm -13 <(git show 236cfef:Brewfile | sort) <(sort Brewfile)` -> prints only `vscode "davidanson.vscode-markdownlint"`; `brew "fzf"` does NOT appear.

**Steps:** insert `brew "fzf"` after `brew "findutils"`, before `brew "gawk"`; verify the comm output is exactly the one pre-existing deviation and brew bundle parses; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "comm -13 <(git show 236cfef:Brewfile | sort) <(sort Brewfile)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brew fzf between findutils and gawk", "added line byte-identical to upstream 236cfef", "no new fork-only Brewfile line (only pre-existing vscode davidanson.vscode-markdownlint)", "brew bundle list --all parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Rework the .zshrc completion setup and add fzf + fzf-tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply the five interdependent `.zshrc` edits from upstream `236cfef` as one atomic change: trim the OMZ block, remove the top completion-zstyle block, broaden the dircolors `list-colors`, add the `# fzf` block, and rework the end block (zsh-completions runs compinit via `atload` -> fzf-tab -> inlined `# zsh/completion` config + `bashcompinit` -> F-Sy-H without `atinit` -> autosuggestions -> autopair).

**Files:**
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] OMZ block drops `COMPLETION_WAITING_DOTS`, `OMZL::completion.zsh`, `OMZL::grep.zsh`; byte-identical to upstream OMZ block.
- [ ] Top completion-zstyle block removed; `history configuration` block immediately followed by `# brew:` block.
- [ ] `:dircolors-load()` body is upstream's broadened `:completion:*` list-colors (4-line comment + zstyle line).
- [ ] `# fzf` block (FZF_DEFAULT_OPTS + `zi auto has"fzf" wait for fzf`) sits between eza and gcloud blocks, byte-identical to upstream.
- [ ] End block `# zsh-completions:` through `# zsh/autopair` byte-identical to upstream (atload compinit -> fzf-tab + cd preview -> `# zsh/completion` config + bashcompinit -> F-Sy-H plain wait -> autosuggestions -> autopair). Stops at autopair; no zsh-bench/.envrc.
- [ ] No remnants: COMPLETION_WAITING_DOTS, OMZL::completion.zsh, OMZL::grep.zsh, old `:completion:*:default` list-colors, F-Sy-H `atinit"zicompinit; zicdreplay"` all absent; zicompinit appears exactly once.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.

**Verify:** four region diffs (OMZ, dircolors, fzf, end-block) against `git show 236cfef:zsh/.zshrc` all empty + `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` -> `OK`.

**Steps:** (full old/new text in plan doc) Step 1 trim OMZ block; Step 2 remove top zstyle block (drop `:completion:*:match:* original only` too); Step 3 broaden dircolors load body; Step 4 insert `# fzf` block between eza and gcloud; Step 5 replace end block with the reworked version (stop at autopair); Step 6 four-region diff + zsh -n -> OK; Step 7 remnant grep -> none, zicompinit count -> 1; Step 8 commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "diff <(git show 236cfef:zsh/.zshrc | sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\\/zsh-autopair$/p') <(sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\\/zsh-autopair$/p' zsh/.zshrc) && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["OMZ block byte-identical to upstream (no COMPLETION_WAITING_DOTS/completion.zsh/grep.zsh)", "top completion-zstyle block removed", "dircolors load body broadened to :completion:* per upstream", "# fzf block between eza and gcloud byte-identical to upstream", "end block #zsh-completions..#zsh/autopair byte-identical to upstream, stops at autopair (no zsh-bench/.envrc)", "no remnants; zicompinit exactly once", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Install fzf and run the end-to-end byte-identity + smoke check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install `fzf` and confirm the reworked slice is correct — every ported line byte-identical to upstream `236cfef`, the file parses, the `fzf` binary is on PATH, and (best-effort) fzf-tab behaves in an interactive shell.

**Files:** (none — verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `brew bundle install --file=./Brewfile` installs `fzf` without error.
- [ ] Full-slice byte-identity holds: the four region diffs (OMZ, dircolors, fzf, end-block) all print no output and `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.
- [ ] No fork-only `.zshrc` line vs upstream originates from the completion/fzf/fzf-tab slice.
- [ ] `command -v fzf` resolves after install.
- [ ] Best-effort interactive check recorded (live ~/.config tracks hollow@main = 236cfef, so `zsh -ic` exercises an equivalent setup, not the fork working copy).

**Verify:** `diff <(git show 236cfef:zsh/.zshrc | sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\/zsh-autopair$/p') <(sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\/zsh-autopair$/p' zsh/.zshrc) && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && command -v fzf >/dev/null && echo OK` -> prints `OK`.

**Steps:** Step 1 `brew bundle install --file=./Brewfile`; Step 2 run four-region diff + zsh -n -> OK; Step 3 `command -v fzf && fzf --version`, record best-effort interactive smoke noting live-config caveat; Step 4 no commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "diff <(git show 236cfef:zsh/.zshrc | sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\\/zsh-autopair$/p') <(sed -n '/^# zsh-completions:/,/^zi auto wait for hlissner\\/zsh-autopair$/p' zsh/.zshrc) && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && command -v fzf >/dev/null && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brew bundle install adds fzf without error", "four-region byte-identity diffs empty + zsh -n passes", "no slice-originated fork-only .zshrc line", "command -v fzf resolves", "best-effort interactive smoke recorded with live-config caveat"]}
```
